title: Revisiting Iran's Nuclear Threshold
text:
Thinking the Unthinkable with Ankit Panda
A bi-weekly podcast featuring in-depth analysis and insight on the perils of a new nuclear age, with Ankit Panda.

Revisiting Iran’s Nuclear Threshold
Thinking the Unthinkable with Ankit Panda
Eric Brewer and Ankit Panda
July 3, 2026

Sign up now and start listening to "Thinking the Unthinkable with Ankit Panda!"Already a member? Sign In to have access to our podcasts

Episode Notes:
Ankit Panda speaks with Eric Brewer about his Texas National Security Review article on how Iran managed — and ultimately mismanaged — its nuclear threshold status. Setting aside the 2026 war itself, Brewer examines the timeline from the Oct. 7, 2023 Hamas-led attacks on Israel to the 2025 "Midnight Hammer" strikes, asking why Iran's nuclear latency failed to deter Israel.
Image: Dean Calma / IAEA via Flickr
